findings.criterion: UNIFY the duplicated direction logic into ONE helper (the inward/outward->relation mapping is copy-pasted in inbound_differ.py and outbound_links.py; `_JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION` is re-declared in acli_graph.py:53, inbound_differ.py:459). One source of truth so the next inversion cannot reappear on an untouched copy.
findings.detail: link_direction.py was created as the intended single source of truth, and inbound_differ.py was successfully migrated to use it via _load_link_direction(). However, outbound_links.py still declares its own local _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION (lines 45-48) and _INVERSE_RELATION (line 57) without importing from link_direction.py, and acli_graph.py still declares its own _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION (lines 53-56). The comment in outbound_links.py even says 'MIRRORS inbound_differ._INVERSE_RELATION' — referencing a copy that no longer exists — and justifies the duplication with the standalone-load concern, which is exactly the same concern that was resolved for inbound_differ.py by using spec_from_file_location on link_direction.py. Two of the three identified copies remain, so the next inversion CAN reappear on an untouched copy of outbound_links.py or acli_graph.py.
findings.remediation: Migrate outbound_links.py to load link_direction.py via spec_from_file_location (the same pattern inbound_differ.py already uses) and delete _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION and _INVERSE_RELATION from outbound_links.py. Apply the same to acli_graph.py (or keep acli_graph.py's separate _RELATION_TO_JIRA_LINK since it is the outbound-only forward map, but remove the reverse _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION copy and use link_direction.JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION).

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
